chapters.name: 替儿子做作业
chapters.subtitle: Doing the Homework for the Son

comic_18.png.cn: 儿子坐在桌前对着作业冥思苦想，爸爸在旁边背着手站着。
comic_18.png.en: The son sits at the desk thinking hard over the homework, while the father stands by with his hands behind his back.

comic_19.png.cn: 爸爸坐下来代替儿子写作业，儿子靠在他肩上。
comic_19.png.en: The father sits down to write the homework in the son's place; the son leans on his shoulder.

comic_20.png.cn: 老师拿着作业本站在三个学生面前。
comic_20.png.en: The teacher stands in front of three pupils, holding the notebook.

comic_01.png.cn: 老师拿着本子，牵着儿子的手往家走。
comic_01.png.en: The teacher leads the son by the hand, carrying the notebook.

comic_02.png.cn: 老师把儿子带回家，爸爸开门时一脸惊讶。
comic_02.png.en: The teacher brings the son home; the father opens the door looking shocked.

comic_03.png.cn: 老师把爸爸按在膝盖上打屁股，作业本掉在地上。
comic_03.png.en: The teacher puts the father over his knee and spanks him; the notebook lies on the floor.

comic_04.png.cn: 爸爸开车出门，儿子从大门里追了出来。
comic_04.png.en: The father drives off; the son runs out from the gate after him.

comic_05.png.cn: 儿子爬上墙头，旁边堆着一摞画纸。
comic_05.png.en: The son climbs onto the wall, with a stack of papers beside him.

comic_06.png.cn: 月光下，爸爸开车回家，看到墙头的画大吃一惊。
comic_06.png.en: Under the moon, the father drives home and is shocked by the drawings he finds on the wall.

comic_07.png.cn: 留着大胡子的街头艺人挂着手摇风琴在唱歌，爸爸递给他一枚硬币。
comic_07.png.en: A bearded street performer sings with a hurdy-gurdy hanging from his neck; the father hands him a coin.

comic_08.png.cn: 爸爸递过来一张纸，艺人接过来端详。
comic_08.png.en: The father holds out a piece of paper; the performer takes it and looks it over.

comic_09.png.cn: 艺人高兴得跳了起来挥手告别，爸爸牵着儿子离开。
comic_09.png.en: The performer leaps up waving in delight as the father walks off with the son.

comic_10.png.cn: 月亮挂在空中，街道上空无一人。
comic_10.png.en: The moon hangs in the sky over an empty street.

comic_11.png.cn: 第二天，那位艺人正坐在大教堂里弹奏管风琴，爸爸和儿子从外面走过。
comic_11.png.en: The next day, the same performer is playing a great pipe organ inside a cathedral as the father and son walk past.

comic_12.png.cn: 爸爸开着红色小汽车，儿子坐在副驾，爸爸举着扳手琢磨。
comic_12.png.en: The father drives a small red car with the son beside him, holding up a wrench in puzzlement.

comic_13.png.cn: 爸爸下了车，弯着腰把头伸进车头检查。
comic_13.png.en: The father gets out and bends down to look into the front of the car.

comic_14.png.cn: 爸爸整个人趴到车下检查。
comic_14.png.en: The father lies flat under the car to inspect it.

comic_15.png.cn: 爸爸坐在车里，外套朝后方飘起。
comic_15.png.en: The father sits in the car with his coat fluttering out behind him.

comic_16.png.cn: 爸爸驾着车，前面儿子骑着滑板车跑得飞快。
comic_16.png.en: The father drives the car while the son zips ahead on a kick scooter.

comic_17.png.cn: 最后爸爸自己骑着小车一路飞驰。
comic_17.png.en: In the end, the father is racing along on the little vehicle himself.
